name: IMA Studio — All-in-One AI Creation
tagline: Image, video, music, TTS in one — SeeDream, Midjourney, Nano Banana, Veo, Sora, Kling, Wan, Pixverse, Suno, DouBao, seed-tts. All-in-one AI creation.
description: All-in-One AI creation: images (SeeDream 4.5, Midjourney, Nano Banana 2), videos (Wan 2.6, Kling, Veo 3.1, Sora, Pixverse, Hailuo, SeeDance, Vidu), music (Suno sonic, DouBao), TTS (seed-tts-2.0). Unified access with intelligent model selection and cross-media workflow orchestration. Use for: any AI content creation including images, videos, music, text-to-speech, multi-media projects. Requires IMA_API_KEY.
credentialNotice: The IMA API key is required at runtime (--api-key or IMA_API_KEY). It is sent only to api.imastudio.com and imapi.liveme.com (IMA Studio domains). Obtain keys at https://www.imaclaw.ai/. Use a scoped or test key if concerned about credential exposure.
optionalDependencyNote: When ima-knowledge-ai is installed, this skill may instruct the agent to read that skill's reference files (~/.openclaw/skills/ima-knowledge-ai/references/*) for workflow and model-selection guidance. The skill works standalone without it; those reads are optional and only for complex or multi-step workflows.

localPaths.purpose: Preferences (model defaults) and generation logs; logs auto-deleted after 7 days. User can delete anytime.

use_cases: Image, video, music, TTS in one entry
Multimodal content creation and workflow orchestration
Character consistency across image and video
key_features: SeeDream, Midjourney, Nano Banana, Wan, Kling, Veo, Sora, Suno, DouBao
Intelligent model selection and knowledge-base support
Alternative to multiple skills (ai-image + ai-video + suno + tts)
